description:
Create a new protocol template named 'Western Blot Protocol' in the SciNote team protocol repository with the description 'Standard Western Blot protocol for protein detection and analysis'. The protocol must include three specific steps: 'Sample Preparation' (Text: 'Lyse cells in RIPA buffer with protease inhibitors. Quantify protein using BCA assay. Prepare samples in Laemmli buffer and heat at 95C for 5 minutes.'), 'Gel Electrophoresis' (Text: 'Load 20-40 ug protein per lane onto SDS-PAGE gel. Run at 100V through stacking gel then 150V through resolving gel.'), and 'Transfer and Detection' (Text: 'Transfer proteins to PVDF membrane at 100V for 1 hour. Block in 5 percent non-fat milk in TBST for 1 hour. Incubate with primary antibody overnight at 4C then secondary antibody for 1 hour.').

Login Credentials:
- E-mail: admin@scinote.net
- Password: inHisHouseAtRlyehDeadCthulhuWaitsDreaming

metadata.expected_description: Standard Western Blot protocol for protein detection and analysis
